name: execution_date
label: Execution Date
hint: Select date of agreement execution

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city and state where agreement is signed

name: parent1_name
label: Parent 1 Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: parent1_address
label: Parent 1 Address
hint: Enter complete residential address

name: parent2_name
label: Parent 2 Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: parent2_address
label: Parent 2 Address
hint: Enter complete residential address

name: relationship_status
label: Relationship Status
hint: Select relationship status of parents

name: relationship_status_other
label: Other Relationship Status
hint: Enter other relationship status

name: number_of_children
label: Number of Children
hint: Enter total number of children

name: legal_custody
label: Legal Custody Type
hint: Select legal custody type

name: sole_legal_custodian
label: Sole Legal Custodian
hint: Select the parent having sole legal custody

name: physical_custody
label: Physical Custody Type
hint: Select physical custody arrangement

name: primary_custodian
label: Primary Custodian
hint: Select the primary custodial parent

name: visitation_schedule
label: Visitation Schedule
hint: Enter detailed visitation terms such as weekdays, weekends, and handover timings

name: holiday_schedule
label: Holiday / Vacation Schedule
hint: Define custody during school holidays, festivals, birthdays, and vacations

name: child_support_applicable
label: Child Support Included
hint: Tick if one parent will pay child support

name: child_support_amount
label: Child Support Amount
hint: Enter monthly support amount

name: child_support_terms
label: Child Support Terms
hint: Mention payment method, due date, escalation, and default consequences

name: education_decisions
label: Education Decisions
hint: Specify responsibility for school selection, fees, and educational decisions

name: medical_decisions
label: Medical Decisions
hint: Specify responsibility for healthcare decisions and emergency treatment

name: health_insurance_holder
label: Health Insurance Holder
hint: Select who will maintain health insurance for the child

name: unreimbursed_medical_expense_split
label: Unreimbursed Medical Expense Split
hint: Enter how co-pays, dental, therapy, and uncovered medical expenses will be shared

name: communication_clause
label: Parent Communication Clause
hint: State how parents will communicate about the child, for example app, email, or phone

name: child_communication_with_non_custodial_parent
label: Child Communication with Non-Custodial Parent
hint: Define phone, video call, or messaging access for the child

name: extracurricular_activities
label: Extracurricular Activities
hint: State how sports, music, coaching, camps, and related costs will be decided and paid

name: travel_permission_required
label: Travel Permission Clause Included
hint: Tick if written consent is required for out-of-state or international travel

name: travel_permission_terms
label: Travel Permission Terms
hint: Describe written-consent requirements, notice period, itinerary sharing, and emergency exceptions

name: passport_possession
label: Passport Possession
hint: State which parent keeps the child passport and how it is released for travel

name: right_of_first_refusal
label: Right of First Refusal Included
hint: Tick if the other parent must be contacted before arranging third-party childcare

name: right_of_first_refusal_hours
label: Right of First Refusal Threshold (Hours)
hint: Enter the minimum number of hours after which the other parent must be contacted

name: right_of_first_refusal_terms
label: Right of First Refusal Terms
hint: Describe how and when the other parent must be contacted before using babysitters or relatives

name: social_media_privacy_clause
label: Social Media / Privacy Clause
hint: State whether parents may post child photos or information on public social media accounts

name: new_partner_introduction_clause_included
label: New Partner Introduction Clause Included
hint: Tick if there are rules for introducing new romantic partners to the child

name: new_partner_introduction_clause
label: New Partner Introduction Clause
hint: Describe notice period, cohabitation restrictions, and introduction rules for new partners

name: relocation_clause
label: Relocation Clause
hint: Conditions for relocation of the child and notice to the other parent

name: dispute_resolution
label: Dispute Resolution
hint: Mention mediation, counseling, or court process before filing disputes

name: modification_clause
label: Modification Clause
hint: Conditions under which the agreement can be modified

name: governing_law
label: Governing Law
hint: Enter applicable law, for example Laws of India

name: jurisdiction
label: Jurisdiction
hint: Enter court jurisdiction

name: parent1_signature
label: Parent 1 Signature
hint: Enter name as signature

name: parent2_signature
label: Parent 2 Signature
hint: Enter name as signature
